# Engineering Log — Agent Instructions

Shared project instructions: `.ai/harness/AGENTS.md` (read it in full before any work).

## Codex-Specific Notes

- Sandboxed environment — no internet access during execution
- Read AGENTS.md and `.ai/harness/AGENTS.md` for all shared conventions
- Skills available under `.codex/skills/`
- No hooks available in Codex sandbox

## Task Workspace

Task IDs MUST be allocated with `.ai/harness/scripts/claim-task-id.sh <slug>`.
All task artifacts → `.ai/tasks/{task_id}_{slug}/`.
Per-session state → `.ai/runtime/current-task/{session_id}.json`.
